## 📋 Today's Overview
*April 29, 2026*

### Superconductivity (9 new today)

1.  The study focuses on **high-mobility two-dimensional electron gases on SrTiO₃ surfaces**, employing **controlled aging and electrostatic side gate tuning** to address/solve **the systematic exploration of electron density and its effect on superconductivity suppression**.
2.  The study focuses on **multi-qubit Bell non-locality in a superconducting quantum processor**, employing **experimental high-dimensional encoding across twelve qubits** to address/solve **the observation of simultaneous high-dimensional and many-body Bell violations**.
3.  The study focuses on **orthorhombic iron selenide (beta FeSe1-x)** , employing **electronic band structure calculations using experimentally determined cell dimensions under pressure** to address/solve **the identification of cosine-shaped bands and flat bands near the Fermi level and their relation to superconductivity**.
4.  The study focuses on **superconducting transmission-line resonators**, employing **third quantization and local field quantization** to address/solve **the foundational justification for why macroscopic charge and flux variables obey quantum commutation relations**.
5.  The study focuses on **on-chip photon coincidence detection for photonic quantum computing**, employing **reconfigurable superconducting cryotron logic** to address/solve **the scaling of feedforward control by performing logic directly on detector outputs**.
6.  The study focuses on **Li₂AuH₆ and Li₂AgH₆ at ambient pressure**, employing **path integral molecular dynamics simulations** to address/solve **the verification of kinetic stability against quantum and thermal fluctuations for high-temperature superconductivity**.
7.  The study focuses on **the topological semimetal WTe₂**, employing **a refined horizontal flux transport crystal growth technique** to address/solve **the achievement of record magnetoresistance, enhanced superconductivity, and improved fermiology through reduced crystal disorder**.
8.  The study focuses on **fermionic impurities coupled to a superconducting bath**, employing **the Grassmann time-evolving matrix product operator method extended to the Nambu formalism** to address/solve **the simulation of quantum impurity problems with superconducting pairing**.
9.  The study focuses on **Eu-doped infinite-layer nickelates**, employing **magnetic field-dependent measurements** to address/solve **the observation of field re-entrant superconductivity and the impact of rare-earth magnetism on intertwined superconducting and magnetic orders**.

### spin glass (2 new today)

1. **Replica Theory of Spherical Boltzmann Machine Ensembles**  
   The study focuses on Boltzmann machine ensembles, employing replica theory to address the scientific problem of understanding the performance benefits of ensemble learning over single-model training.  

2. **Bayesian phase transition for the critical Ising model: Enlarged replica symmetry in the epsilon expansion and in 2D**  
   The study focuses on the critical Ising model under bond-energy measurements, employing replica field theory (epsilon expansion) and 2D numerical simulations to solve the problem of characterizing the transition into the strong-measurement phase and its associated multiscaling.

| 1 | **[Suppression of Superconductivity and Electrostatic Side Gate Tuning in High Mobility SrTiO$_3$ Surface Electron Gas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22205v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We report on the fabrication and characterization of patterned high-mobility two-dimensional electron gases (2DEG) formed on SrTiO$_3$ (STO) substrate surfaces by hydrogen plasma exposure. The resulting devices consistently showed high electron mobilities up to 7400 cm$^2$/V$\cdot$s. A large range of electron density was systematically explored by controlled aging of the sample between cooldowns, including the expected range for the STO 2DEG superconducting dome. No superconducting transition was observed down to the base temperature of approximately 10 mK. This suggests suppression of superconductivity in high mobility quasi-two-dimensional SrTiO$_3$ electron gas, likely linked to vertical confinement and electronic orbital rearrangement. We systematically explored electrostatic gate modulation in this 2DEG system and its scaling with electron density and side gate geometry. In contrast with our initial expectation, we observed an improvement of achievable total modulation for larger side gate to channel separation. At low electron density, stochastic channel pinch-off events were observed, creating quasi-ballistic constrictions with irregular conductance quantization. This epitaxy-free and high mobility oxide material platform offers a promising new route towards patterning quantum devices.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们报道了通过氢等离子体暴露在 SrTiO₃ (STO) 衬底表面形成的图案化高迁移率二维电子气 (2DEG) 的制备与表征。所得器件始终展现出高达 7400 cm²/V·s 的高电子迁移率。通过样品在降温间的受控老化，我们系统地探索了宽范围的电子密度，包括 STO 2DEG 超导穹顶的预期范围。在低至约 10 mK 的基温下未观察到超导转变。这表明高迁移率准二维 SrTiO₃ 电子气中的超导电性被抑制，可能源于垂直限域和电子轨道重排。我们系统地研究了该 2DEG 系统中的静电门控调制及其随电子密度和侧栅几何尺寸的标度关系。与初始预期相反，我们观察到侧栅与沟道间距越大，可实现的总调制幅度反而提升。在低电子密度下，观察到随机沟道夹断事件，形成了具有不规则电导量子化的准弹道收缩区。这种无外延且高迁移率的氧化物材料平台为量子器件的图案化提供了一条有前景的新途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Dickson Boahen et al. |
| 2 | **[Experimental high-dimensional multi-qubit Bell non-locality on a superconducting quantum processor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24740v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Combining recent advances in superconducting quantum hardware, we explore quantum correlations in a previously inaccessible regime by observing \emph{simultaneously} high-dimensional and many-body Bell non-locality. We report a high-confidence Bell violation in the correlations between two $d=64$-dimensional systems encoded in twelve qubits. For system sizes up to $d=32$, the strength of the observed nonlocal correlations exceeds the quantum upper bound for $d=2$ systems, providing direct evidence of high-dimensional nonlocality. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the observed violation is genuinely collective: all qubits contribute to the nonlocal correlations, while most pairwise correlations across the bipartition remain Bell-local. Our work illustrates how present-day quantum processors enable the exploration of fundamental predictions of quantum mechanics in previously inaccessible regimes and, in turn, how fundamental quantum effects can be used to benchmark their performance.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>结合超导量子硬件的最新进展，我们通过观测同时具有高维和多体特性的贝尔非局域性，探索了先前无法触及的量子关联。我们在编码于十二个量子比特中的两个 d=64 维系统之间的关联中，报告了高置信度的贝尔不等式违背。对于系统维度高达 d=32 的情况，观测到的非局域关联强度超过了 d=2 系统的量子上界，直接证明了高维非局域性的存在。此外，我们证明观测到的违背是真正集体性的：所有量子比特都对非局域关联有贡献，而二分划分下的大多数成对关联仍保持贝尔局域性。我们的工作展示了当代量子处理器如何能够探索量子力学在先前无法触及区域的基本预言，反之，基本量子效应又如何可用于基准测试其性能。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Yousef Mafi et al. |
| 3 | **[Cosine bands, flat bands and superconductivity in orthorhombic iron selenide](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24298v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Electronic band structures (EBSs) for orthorhombic beta FeSe1-x at less than 16 K and up to 23 GPa using experimentally determined cell dimensions are evaluated for cosine-shaped bands near, or crossing, EF. Cosine shaped bands are present in reciprocal directions parallel to the c axis at all pressures. Calculations using a P1 cell derived from Cmma symmetry with a 2c superlattice moderates the effect of intersecting bands to 9.0 GPa. This approach enables determination of a superconducting gap consistent with experimentally determined values. Key influences on charge distribution and transfer in the interplanar region of beta FeSe1-x are lone pair electrons which feature as flat bands (FBs) near EF along GZ in an EBS. FBs also influence the topology of Fermi surfaces as pressure increases and in directions parallel to the c* direction (i.e. offset along ky) within the Brillouin zone. At the Fermi surface along b*, cosine bands split and align favorably for electron-hole pairing with nodal inflection points located at EF. For P greater than 12.0 GPa, FBs interact with folded cosine bands invoking additional band dispersions. These calculations suggest that FBs participate in, and with increased pressure, enhance and sustain the superconducting properties of beta FeSe1-x to 23 GPa.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>利用实验确定的晶胞尺寸，评估了正交相 β-FeSe₁₋ₓ 在低于 16 K 和高达 23 GPa 压力下，靠近或穿越费米能级 (EF) 的余弦形能带的电子能带结构 (EBS)。在所有压力下，平行于 c 轴的倒易方向上均存在余弦形能带。使用源自 Cmma 对称性并带有 2c 超晶格的 P1 晶胞进行的计算，将能带交叉效应缓和至 9.0 GPa 以下。该方法能够确定与实验值一致的超导能隙。β-FeSe₁₋ₓ 层间区域电荷分布与转移的关键影响因素是孤对电子，其在 EBS 中沿 GZ 方向表现为靠近 EF 的平带 (FB)。随着压力增加以及在布里渊区内平行于 c* 方向（即沿 ky 方向偏移），FB 也影响费米面的拓扑结构。在沿 b* 方向的费米面上，余弦能带分裂并对齐，有利于在 EF 处具有节点拐点的电子-空穴配对。当压力大于 12.0 GPa 时，FB 与折叠的余弦能带相互作用，引发额外的能带色散。这些计算表明，FB 参与并随压力增加而增强和维持 β-FeSe₁₋ₓ 在高达 23 GPa 压力下的超导特性。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Ian D R Mackinnon et al. |
| 4 | **[Third Quantization for Order Parameters (II): Local Field Quantization in Superconducting Quantum Circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24092v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The quantization of superconducting transmission-line resonators is usually introduced phenomenologically by modeling the resonator as an effective LC circuit and imposing canonical commutation relations on macroscopic variables such as charge and flux. Although this approach is highly successful, it leaves open why these macroscopic variables should obey quantum commutation relations and how this behavior emerges from the superconducting state. In this work, starting from the microscopic pairing Hamiltonian underlying BCS superconductivity, we derive the low-energy effective Hamiltonian of a circuit-QED architecture containing a superconducting transmission line with distributed capacitive and inductive elements. We establish quantitative relations between macroscopic observables, including current and voltage, and the spatially local superconducting phase, as well as the microscopic parameters of the electron-phonon system. We then extend the third quantization of the superconducting order parameter, introduced in Paper (I) for the global phase, to the spatially local case. This gives a macroscopic field quantization of the superconducting phase. We show that, after restriction to the low-energy excitation subspace, the local superconducting phase becomes a genuine quantum dynamical variable. Thus, the quantum behavior of transmission-line resonators need not be postulated at the macroscopic level, but follows from the third quantization of the superconducting order parameter. These results suggest that capacitive and inductive superconducting circuit elements share the same microscopic origin, providing a unified framework for superconducting circuit quantization.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导传输线谐振器的量子化通常是通过唯象方法引入的，即将谐振器建模为有效 LC 电路，并对电荷和通量等宏观变量施加正则对易关系。尽管这种方法非常成功，但它并未阐明为何这些宏观变量应服从量子对易关系，以及这种行为如何从超导态中涌现出来。在本工作中，我们从 BCS 超导电性背后的微观配对哈密顿量出发，推导了包含具有分布式电容和电感元件的超导传输线的电路量子电动力学架构的低能有效哈密顿量。我们建立了宏观可观测量（包括电流和电压）与空间局域超导相位以及电子-声子系统的微观参数之间的定量关系。然后，我们将论文 (I) 中针对全局相位引入的超导序参量的第三次量子化扩展到空间局域情形。这给出了超导相位的宏观场量子化。我们证明，在限制到低能激发子空间后，局域超导相位成为一个真正的量子动力学变量。因此，传输线谐振器的量子行为无需在宏观层面进行假设，而是源自超导序参量的第三次量子化。这些结果表明，电容性和电感性超导电路元件具有相同的微观起源，为超导电路量子化提供了一个统一的框架。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Miao-Miao Yi et al. |
| 5 | **[Reconfigurable Superconducting Logic for On-Chip Photon Coincidence Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22101v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Scaling photonic quantum-information platforms requires arrays of superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors (SNSPDs) for feedforward control, in which optical operations are conditioned on preceding Bell-state measurements that typically rely on photon coincidence detections. On-chip superconducting cryotron electronics, performing logic directly on detector outputs and subsequently driving optical modulators, could substantially reduce latency and room-temperature interconnect complexity for feedforward schemes. To date, no cryotron logic gates specifically designed to process SNSPD outputs for quantum applications have been demonstrated. We demonstrate a bias-programmable logic gate based on three nanocryotrons (nTrons), fabricated using the same thin-film technology as SNSPDs. The circuit implements selectable AND (coincidence), XOR (odd-parity), and OR functions on two externally generated electrical pulses at 4.2 K, with bit-error rates below $10^{-3}$, bias margins up to $\pm24\%$, and operation extending to 25 MHz over narrower bias windows. Moreover, it performs coincidence and odd-parity detection on two co-fabricated SNSPDs' outputs with bit-error rates below $3.2 \times 10^{-2}$. As a proof-of-concept, we show that nTrons can drive capacitive loads up to 1.15 V, potentially enabling compatibility with electro-optic modulators in feedforward schemes.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>扩展光子量子信息平台需要用于前馈控制的超导纳米线单光子探测器 (SNSPD) 阵列，其中光学操作取决于先前的贝尔态测量，而贝尔态测量通常依赖于光子符合探测。直接在探测器输出端执行逻辑并随后驱动光学调制器的片上超导低温管电子学，可以显著降低前馈方案的延迟和室温互连复杂度。迄今为止，尚未有专门设计用于处理 SNSPD 输出以用于量子应用的低温管逻辑门被展示。我们展示了一个基于三个纳米低温管 (nTrons) 的偏置可编程逻辑门，采用与 SNSPD 相同的薄膜技术制造。该电路在 4.2 K 下对两个外部产生的电脉冲实现了可选择的 AND（符合）、XOR（奇偶校验）和 OR 功能，误码率低于 10⁻³，偏置裕度高达 ±24%，并在更窄的偏置窗口内可扩展至 25 MHz 运行。此外，它还对两个共制造的 SNSPD 输出执行符合和奇偶校验检测，误码率低于 3.2 × 10⁻²。作为概念验证，我们展示了 nTrons 可以驱动高达 1.15 V 的容性负载，这有望实现与前馈方案中电光调制器的兼容性。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Gabriel Le Guay et al. |
| 6 | **[Kinetic instability and superconductivity in Li$_2$AuH$_6$ and Li$_2$AgH$_6$ at ambient pressure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12367v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Li$_2$AuH$_6$ and Li$_2$AgH$_6$ have been proposed as promising candidates for high-temperature superconductors under ambient pressure. While previous studies confirm the dynamic stability of these two thermodynamically unstable systems, their kinetic stability against quantum and thermal fluctuations remains to be verified. In this work, we use path integral molecular dynamics simulations to examine the kinetic stability of Li$_2$AuH$_6$ and Li$_2$AgH$_6$ under ambient pressure. We find both compounds are kinetically unstable. Li$_2$AgH$_6$ undergoes lattice collapse, whereas Li$_2$AuH$_6$ retains a stable fluorite-type Li-Au sublattice, but hydrogen atoms partially dimerize into molecules and diffuse within the host lattice. Using the stochastic path-integral approach, which is a nonperturbative approach applicable to systems with diffusive atoms, we investigate the superconductivity of Li$_2$AuH$_6$ in this state. We predict a superconducting transition temperature of 22 K, well below earlier predictions, due to the low density of states at the Fermi level caused by the collapse of hydrogen sublattice and hydrogen dimerization.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>Li₂AuH₆和Li₂AgH₆已被提出作为常压高温超导体的候选材料。尽管先前的研究证实了这两个热力学不稳定体系的动力学稳定性，但其抵抗量子涨落和热涨落的动力学稳定性仍有待验证。本研究采用路径积分分子动力学模拟，考察了Li₂AuH₆和Li₂AgH₆在常压下的动力学稳定性。我们发现这两种化合物均动力学不稳定：Li₂AgH₆发生晶格塌缩，而Li₂AuH₆虽保持稳定的萤石型Li-Au亚晶格，但氢原子部分二聚化为分子并在宿主晶格内扩散。通过随机路径积分方法（一种适用于含扩散原子体系的非微扰方法），我们研究了该状态下Li₂AuH₆的超导电性。预测其超导转变温度为22 K，远低于早期预测值，这是由于氢亚晶格塌缩与氢二聚化导致费米能级处态密度降低所致。</p></details> | 2026-04-26 | Yucheng Ding et al. |
| 7 | **[Record magnetoresistance, enhanced superconductivity, and fermiology in WTe2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23378v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The diverse electronic properties of transition metal chalcogenides can be very sensitive to crystal imperfections. A new crystal growth technique, known as horizontal flux transport, offers a route to improved crystal quality. By refining this technique and applying it to the topological semimetal WTe2, we achieved crystals with an order of magnitude less disorder as determined by electrical transport and scanning tunneling microscopy measurements. At low temperatures these crystals exhibit the largest magnetoresistance reported in a metal. Exfoliated monolayers show quantum oscillations for the first time in the electrostatically doped metallic states, enabling determination of band degeneracies and the valley splitting induced by an electric field. Moreover, they exhibit a gated superconducting dome with a greatly enhanced critical temperature approaching 1.8 K. This advance opens up new avenues for employing WTe2 in topological electronics and gated superconducting devices, and promises comparable breakthroughs with other chalcogenides.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>过渡金属硫族化合物的多样化电子性质对晶体缺陷极为敏感。一种名为水平通量传输的新型晶体生长技术为提升晶体质量提供了途径。通过改进该技术并应用于拓扑半金属WTe₂，我们获得了无序度降低一个数量级的晶体（由电输运和扫描隧道显微镜测量确定）。低温下，这些晶体展现出金属中迄今最大的磁电阻。剥离单层在静电掺杂金属态中首次观测到量子振荡，从而能够确定能带简并度及电场诱导的谷劈裂。此外，它们呈现门控超导穹顶，临界温度显著提升至接近1.8 K。这一进展为WTe₂在拓扑电子学和门控超导器件中的应用开辟了新途径，并有望在其他硫族化合物中实现类似突破。</p></details> | 2026-04-25 | Gianluca Delgado et al. |
| 8 | **[Grassmann time-evolving matrix product operators for fermionic impurities coupled to a superconducting bath](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23301v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The Grassmann time-evolving matrix product operator (GTEMPO) method, which represents the Feynman-Vernon influence functional as a temporal matrix product state, has been shown to be a flexible and potentially scalable solution for fermionic quantum impurity problems. In this work, we extend GTEMPO to solve fermionic impurity problems in the Nambu formalism, in which the impurity is coupled to a superconducting bath. A key insight is that by employing the Bogoliubov transformation for the superconducting bath, one could obtain the analytic expression of the Feynman-Vernon influence functional in a similar form to the case of a normal bath, after which the core algorithms of GTEMPO can be straightforwardly adapted. We demonstrate the accuracy of our method by benchmarking it against exact diagonalization in several exactly solvable cases, and against the continuous-time quantum Monte Carlo method using converged dynamical mean field theory (DMFT) iterations on the imaginary contour in the non-integrable case. In all cases, we perform both imaginary- and real-time calculations to illustrate the flexibility of our method. These results illustrate that our method could be potentially useful as an impurity solver in DMFT as well as its non-equilibrium extension for fermionic impurity problems in the Nambu formalism.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>格拉斯曼时间演化矩阵乘积算符（GTEMPO）方法将费曼-弗农影响泛函表示为时间矩阵乘积态，已被证明是费米子量子杂质问题的灵活且可扩展的解决方案。本研究将GTEMPO扩展至Nambu形式下的费米子杂质问题，其中杂质与超导库耦合。关键洞察在于：通过对超导库采用Bogoliubov变换，可获得与正常库情形形式相似的费曼-弗农影响泛函解析表达式，从而可直接适配GTEMPO的核心算法。我们通过若干精确可解案例与精确对角化方法的比对，以及在不可积情形下基于虚时收敛动力学平均场理论（DMFT）迭代与连续时间量子蒙特卡洛方法的比对，验证了本方法的准确性。所有案例均同时进行虚时和实时计算以展示方法的灵活性。这些结果表明，本方法在Nambu形式下的费米子杂质问题中，有望作为DMFT及其非平衡扩展的杂质求解器。</p></details> | 2026-04-25 | Chu Guo et al. |
| 9 | **[Field re-entrant superconductivity in Eu-doped infinite-layer nickelates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.14666v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Intertwined superconducting and magnetic orders may give rise to exotic quantum phases, including field-induced and re-entrant superconductivity. However, such magnetism-enhanced superconductivity has remained elusive in superconductors with higher transition temperatures. While infinite-layer nickelates represent a new class of unconventional superconductors, the impact of rare-earth magnetism on superconducting properties remains largely unexplored. Here, we show that Eu-doped infinite-layer nickelate Sm$_{0.95-x}$Ca$_{0.05}$Eu$_x$NiO$_2$ exhibits a magnetic-field-induced re-entrant superconducting phase in the Eu-rich over-doped regime. Zero-resistance transport and high-field diamagnetic screening confirm the superconducting nature of this phase, which emerges after the initial suppression of low-field superconductivity and remains robust across a broad range of temperatures, fields and field orientations. In the same doping range, we observe nonlinear Hall transport and hysteretic magnetoresistance, indicating the unconventional nature of the re-entrant behaviour. While partially consistent with a compensation mechanism between the Eu-derived exchange field and the applied field, our data reveal pronounced deviations from this model at the highest-doping levels. Our findings establish infinite-layer nickelates as a fertile platform for exploring magnetically driven high-field superconductivity in strongly correlated oxides.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导序与磁序的交织可能催生奇异量子相，包括场诱导超导和重入超导。然而，在更高转变温度的超导体中，此类磁性增强超导现象仍难以捉摸。尽管无限层镍酸盐代表了一类新型非常规超导体，但稀土磁性对超导性质的影响仍鲜有探究。本文展示：掺铕无限层镍酸盐Sm₀.₉₅₋ₓCa₀.₀₅EuₓNiO₂在富铕过掺杂区域呈现磁场诱导的重入超导相。零电阻输运和高场抗磁屏蔽证实了该相的超导本质——它在低场超导性被初步抑制后出现，并在宽泛的温度、磁场及场取向范围内保持稳定。在同一掺杂区间，我们观测到非线性霍尔输运和磁阻滞回现象，表明重入行为的非常规特性。虽然部分符合Eu衍生交换场与外场之间的补偿机制，但数据在最高掺杂水平上显示出与该模型的显著偏差。我们的发现确立了无限层镍酸盐作为探索强关联氧化物中磁驱动高场超导性的丰饶平台。</p></details> | 2026-04-25 | Mingwei Yang et al. |
| 10 | **[$3d_{z^2}$ orbital delocalization and magnetic collapse in superconducting (La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7-δ}$ films](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21899v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The recent discovery of Ruddlesden--Popper (RP) nickelate thin-film superconductors has opened a new frontier in unconventional superconductivity. Its realization requires both compressive epitaxial strain and highly oxidative growth conditions, yet the microscopic pathway from the parent phase to the superconducting phase remains elusive. Here, X-ray absorption spectra and resonant inelastic X-ray scattering are employed to track this evolution by independently tuning strain and oxygen content in (La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7-δ}$ thin films. We uncover a remarkable two-step narrative. First, signatures of delocalization emerge in the same way upon two independent tunings: Spectral weight transfers from a ''Upper Hubbard''-like peak to the hole-like peak associated with O $2p_z$ state, and in parallel, the initially localized Ni $3d_{z^2}$ orbital becomes more itinerant followed by the broadening and weakening of $dd$ orbital excitations. Second, as itinerancy increases, long-range spin-density-wave (SDW) order is suppressed in both intensity and correlation length, indicating direct competition with superconductivity. Yet, short-range magnons persist: they become damped but their bandwidth stays unchanged. Our results paint a coherent picture that both strain and oxygenation drive the RP bilayer nickelates towards the superconducting instability, where the O $2p_z$ and Ni $3d_{z^2}$ orbitals become delocalized. Concomitantly, the long-range magnetic order loses coherence and gets suppressed. These findings establish an orbital-selective route to RP nickelate superconductivity, in which the delocalization of the $2p_z$ and $3d_{z^2}$ orbitals and the robust short-range magnons upon the melting of SDW order are prerequisites, providing strong constraints for theory and the roadmap for designing nickelate superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近年来发现的Ruddlesden-Popper（RP）相镍酸盐薄膜超导体为非常规超导开辟了新前沿。其实现需要同时满足压应变外延生长和强氧化生长条件，但从母相到超导相的微观路径仍不明确。本文利用X射线吸收谱和共振非弹性X射线散射，通过独立调控(La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7-δ}$薄膜中的应变和氧含量来追踪这一演化过程。我们揭示了一个引人注目的两步机制：首先，在两种独立调控方式下，退局域化特征以相同方式出现——光谱权重从类似“上哈伯德”峰转移到与O $2p_z$态相关的空穴峰，同时原本局域的Ni $3d_{z^2}$轨道变得更具巡游性，伴随$dd$轨道激发峰的展宽和减弱；其次，随着巡游性增强，长程自旋密度波（SDW）有序的强度和关联长度均被抑制，表明其与超导性存在直接竞争，但短程磁振子依然存在——它们虽被阻尼但带宽保持不变。我们的结果描绘出一幅连贯图景：应变和氧化作用共同驱动RP双层镍酸盐趋向超导不稳定性，在此过程中O $2p_z$和Ni $3d_{z^2}$轨道变得退局域化，同时长程磁有序失去相干性并被抑制。这些发现确立了通向RP镍酸盐超导的轨道选择性路径，其中$2p_z$和$3d_{z^2}$轨道的退局域化以及SDW序熔化后稳健的短程磁振子是必要前提，为理论提供了强约束条件，也为设计镍酸盐超导体指明了方向。</p></details> | 2026-04-24 | Xiaoyang Chen et al. |
| 11 | **[Time-reversal symmetry breaking superconductivity in the presence of loop-current fluctuations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.19313v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Loop currents have been proposed in various superconductors and recently confirmed in kagome materials, raising a fundamental question regarding their intrinsic connection to superconductivity. Here, we study a sign-problem-free bilayer $t-J_{\perp}-V$ model hosting a spontaneous interlayer loop-current parent state, and explore the interplay between loop-current fluctuations and superconductivity using unbiased projector quantum Monte Carlo simulations. Near half-filling, unbiased interlayer interactions induce spontaneous loop currents that break time-reversal symmetry. Upon hole doping, the loop-current order is suppressed, and interlayer $s$-wave superconductivity emerges where loop-current fluctuations become dominant. We establish a phase diagram revealing a transition from the loop-current parent to a superconducting state, reminiscent of the evolution from an antiferromagnetic parent to superconductivity in cuprates. Strikingly, a coexisting regime emerges near the phase boundary, yielding time-reversal-symmetry-breaking superconductivity. Our study reveals an intrinsic connection between loop currents and superconductivity, and identifies a promising mechanism for time-reversal symmetry breaking in superconductors. Furthermore, our results offer insights into unconventional superconductivity in loop-current systems and establish a minimal theoretical framework for understanding time-reversal symmetry breaking in bilayer correlated electron systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>环电流已在多种超导体中被提出，并最近在笼目材料中得到证实，这引发了关于其与超导性内在联系的根本性问题。本文研究一个无符号问题的双层$t-J_{\perp}-V$模型，该模型具有自发层间环电流母相，并利用无偏投影量子蒙特卡洛模拟探索环电流涨落与超导性之间的相互作用。在半填充附近，无偏层间相互作用诱导出自发环电流，破坏时间反演对称性。在空穴掺杂下，环电流序被抑制，层间$s$波超导性出现，此时环电流涨落占据主导地位。我们建立了一个相图，揭示了从环电流母相到超导态的转变，类似于铜氧化物中从反铁磁母相到超导性的演化。引人注目的是，在相边界附近出现共存区域，产生时间反演对称性破缺的超导性。我们的研究揭示了环电流与超导性之间的内在联系，并确定了超导体中时间反演对称性破缺的一种有前景的机制。此外，我们的结果为环电流系统中的非常规超导性提供了见解，并为理解双层关联电子系统中的时间反演对称性破缺建立了最小理论框架。</p></details> | 2026-04-24 | Zenghui Fan et al. |
| 12 | **[Free Majorana Fermions with Superconducting Quantum Wires and a Magnetic Impurity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.03380v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Through the two-channel Kondo model, I address a magnetic spin-1/2 impurity interacting with a bound state of spin origin at the edge in a Luther-Emery liquid showing a spin gap in the bulk. The system presents two zero-energy Majorana fermions of magnetic origin, one on the impurity site and one at the edge. I derive the wavefunction at the edge for the produced zero-energy Majorana fermion bound state within the same formalism as topological interfaces. I present alternative versions of the quantum field theory revealing the specific pairing of the Majorana fermions in the bulk. I address local physical responses. I develop the idea that this model can be realized with a magnetic impurity bridging the gap between two s-wave superconducting wires. I show the protection of the zero-energy Majorana fermions that will be referred to as free Majorana fermions.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>通过双通道近藤模型，我研究了一个磁性自旋1/2杂质与Luther-Emery液体边缘自旋起源束缚态之间的相互作用，该液体在体相中表现出自旋能隙。系统呈现两个磁起源的零能马约拉纳费米子，一个位于杂质位点，另一个位于边缘。我采用与拓扑界面相同的形式，推导出所产生的零能马约拉纳费米子束缚态在边缘的波函数。我提出了量子场论的替代版本，揭示了体相中马约拉纳费米子的特定配对方式。我讨论了局域物理响应。我发展了这样一个想法：该模型可以通过一个磁性杂质桥接两根$s$波超导导线之间的间隙来实现。我展示了零能马约拉纳费米子的保护性，这些费米子将被称为自由马约拉纳费米子。</p></details> | 2026-04-24 | Karyn Le Hur et al. |
| 13 | **[Theoretical prediction of strong-coupling superconductivity in a hypothetical NaAlH3 phase at ambient pressure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22300v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We present a comprehensive first-principles investigation of a hypothetical cubic Pm-3m phase of the ternary hydride NaAlH3, focusing on its lattice dynamics, electronic structure, and electron-phonon-mediated superconducting properties at ambient pressure. Using density functional theory and the Migdal-Eliashberg formalism, we find an exceptionally strong electron-phonon coupling ($λ=2.23$), resulting in a superconducting critical temperature of up to 73.7 K for a Coulomb pseudopotential $μ^* = 0.1$. Phonon dispersion calculations, complemented by ab initio molecular dynamics simulations, indicate dynamic and thermal stability within the adopted theoretical framework. The electronic structure exhibits a metallic character with substantial contributions from Al- and Na-derived states at the Fermi level. The resulting superconducting gap ratio ($2Δ(0)/k_B T_c \approx 4.8$) and specific heat jump ($ΔC/γT_c \approx 2.2$) significantly exceed BCS weak-coupling predictions, highlighting the strong-coupling nature of superconductivity in this hypothetical phase.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们对假设的三元氢化物NaAlH$_3$的立方Pm-3m相进行了全面的第一性原理研究，重点关注其常压下的晶格动力学、电子结构以及电声子介导的超导性质。利用密度泛函理论和Migdal-Eliashberg形式，我们发现异常强的电声子耦合（$λ=2.23$），对于库仑赝势$μ^* = 0.1$，超导临界温度高达73.7 K。结合从头算分子动力学模拟的声子色散计算表明，在所采用的理论框架内，该相具有动态和热稳定性。电子结构呈现金属性特征，费米能级处有大量来自Al和Na衍生态的贡献。由此产生的超导能隙比（$2Δ(0)/k_B T_c \approx 4.8$）和比热跳变（$ΔC/γT_c \approx 2.2$）显著超过BCS弱耦合预言，突显了该假设相中超导性的强耦合本质。</p></details> | 2026-04-24 | Izabela A. Wrona et al. |
| 14 | **[PAEMS: Precise and Adaptive Error Model for Superconducting Quantum Processors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29439v4)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting quantum processor units (QPUs) are incapable of producing massive datasets for quantum error correction (QEC) because of hardware limitations. Thus, QEC decoders heavily depend on synthetic data from qubit error models. Classic depolarizing error models with polynomial complexity present limited accuracy. Coherent density matrix methods suffer from exponential complexity $\propto O(4^n)$ where $n$ represents the number of qubits. This paper introduces PAEMS: a precise and adaptive qubit error model. Its qubit-wise separation framework, incorporating leakage propagation, captures error evolvements crossing spatial and temporal domains. Utilizing repetition-code experiment datasets, PAEMS effectively identifies the intrinsic qubit errors through an end-to-end optimization pipeline. Experiments on IBM's QPUs have demonstrated a 19.5$\times$, 9.3$\times$, and 5.2$\times$ reduction in timelike, spacelike, and spacetime error correlation, respectively, surpassing all of the previous works. It also outperforms the accuracy of Google's SI1000 error model by 58$\sim$73\% on multiple quantum platforms, including IBM's Brisbane, Sherbrooke, and Torino, as well as China Mobile's Wuyue and China Telecom's Tianyan.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导量子处理器单元（QPU）由于硬件限制无法生成用于量子纠错（QEC）的大规模数据集。因此，QEC解码器严重依赖于来自量子比特错误模型的合成数据。具有多项式复杂度的经典去极化错误模型精度有限。相干密度矩阵方法则面临指数复杂度$\propto O(4^n)$（$n$代表量子比特数）的困境。本文引入PAEMS：一种精确且自适应的量子比特错误模型。其量子比特分离框架结合泄漏传播，能够捕获跨越空间和时间域的错误演化。利用重复码实验数据集，PAEMS通过端到端优化流程有效识别内在量子比特错误。在IBM QPU上的实验表明，时间类、空间类和时空错误相关性分别降低了19.5倍、9.3倍和5.2倍，超越了所有先前工作。在多个量子平台上，包括IBM的Brisbane、Sherbrooke和Torino，以及中国移动的Wuyue和中国电信的天衍，其精度比Google的SI1000错误模型高出58%至73%。</p></details> | 2026-04-24 | Songhuan He et al. |
| 15 | **[Non-volatile superconducting tunnelling magnetoresistance memory enabled by exchange-field gap engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22214v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Scalable, low-dissipation memory operating below 4 K is a critical requirement for superconducting and quantum computing systems. Existing cryogenic memory technologies rely on CMOS derivatives or hybrid architectures that incur leakage, refresh overhead or limited compatibility with superconducting logic. Here we demonstrate a superconducting tunnelling magnetoresistance device that functions as a non-volatile cryogenic memory element across the full superconducting temperature range. By integrating a de Gennes spin valve with a superconducting tunnel junction in a current perpendicular-to-plane geometry, we realise exchange-field control of the superconducting energy gap. This produces two magnetically switchable gap voltages and robust quasiparticle tunnelling magnetoresistance down to 0.25 K.The device operates at millivolt bias with nanowatt-level read power and zero standby dissipation. Its vertical junction architecture and Nb-based materials platform enable compatibility with superconducting logic and scalable cryogenic memory arrays.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在4 K以下可扩展、低功耗运行的存储器是超导与量子计算系统的关键需求。现有低温存储技术依赖CMOS衍生架构或混合架构，存在漏电、刷新开销或与超导逻辑兼容性有限的问题。本文展示了一种在完整超导温区内可作为非易失性低温存储元件的超导隧穿磁阻器件。通过将de Gennes自旋阀与超导隧道结集成于垂直电流构型中，我们实现了对超导能隙的交换场调控，从而获得两种磁可切换的能隙电压，并在低至0.25 K的温度下实现稳健的准粒子隧穿磁阻。该器件在毫伏偏压下工作，读取功耗为纳瓦级，且待机功耗为零。其垂直结架构与基于铌的材料平台使其具备与超导逻辑及可扩展低温存储阵列的兼容性。</p></details> | 2026-04-24 | Sonam Bhakat et al. |
| 16 | **[Enhanced Tantalum Superconducting Resonator Performance via All-Surface Organic Monolayer Passivation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22112v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Tantalum is a promising platform for superconducting quantum circuits, yet coherence times remain limited by dielectric losses from interfacial two-level systems (TLS), exacerbated by native oxide regrowth. Here, we implement molecular surface passivation using self-assembled organic monolayers on freshly etched tantalum and silicon in coplanar waveguide resonators. Surface characterization by contact angle, XPS, FTIR and TEM confirm the formation of ordered, nanometer-thick films that suppress oxide formation. Microwave measurements in the ~5-9 GHz range reveal internal quality factors up to 1.8x10^6 in the single-photon regime at 100 mK, representing a ~140% improvement over untreated devices with native oxide. Power and temperature dependent measurements attribute this enhancement to reduced TLS-induced losses. These results demonstrate that molecular passivation effectively engineers low-loss interfaces and provides a scalable route toward high-coherence superconducting quantum devices.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>钽是超导量子电路的重要平台，但其相干时间仍受限于界面二能级系统（TLS）引起的介电损耗，而自然氧化层的再生长会进一步加剧该问题。本文在共面波导谐振器中，采用自组装有机单分子层对新鲜刻蚀的钽和硅表面进行分子钝化处理。通过接触角测量、XPS、FTIR和TEM进行的表面表征证实形成了有序的纳米级薄膜，有效抑制了氧化层生成。在约5-9 GHz频段的微波测量显示，100 mK下单光子态内部品质因子高达1.8×10⁶，较含自然氧化层的未处理器件提升约140%。功率与温度依赖性测量表明，该增强源于TLS诱导损耗的降低。这些结果证明分子钝化可有效构建低损耗界面，并为实现高相干超导量子器件提供了可扩展路径。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Harsh Gupta et al. |
| 17 | **[d-Wave pair density wave superconductivity in a two-orbital model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07511v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Motivated by exploring superconductivity in multi-orbital systems, we study two orbital models of spinful fermions representing ($p_x,p_y$) or ($d_{xz}, d_{yz})$ orbitals on the square lattice. For minimal interorbital $t$-$J$ or $t$-$V$ on-site interactions, a random phase approximation uncovers regimes of instability towards incommensurate $d_{xy}$ pair density wave ($d$-PDW) superconductivity with driven by interband pairing. We study the competition of PDW order with uniform nodal $d_{xy}$ pairing states and magnetic and charge density wave (CDW) instabilities. At strong coupling, we derive an effective hard-core Cooper pair Hamiltonian which we study using a bosonic Gutzwiller ansatz to reveal a period-$2$ PDW over a wide range of fillings as well as a checkerboard CDW at quarter-filling. Our results apply to correlated multi-orbital materials with quasi-1D bands, Hubbard models on the square-octagon lattice, and atomic fermions in $p$-orbitals. Our work highlights the role of the orbital content and multiband Fermi surfaces in stabilizing interband PDW states.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>受探索多轨道系统中超导电性的启发，我们研究了两种自旋费米子轨道模型，分别对应正方晶格上的（p_x, p_y）或（d_{xz}, d_{yz}）轨道。对于最小化的轨道间t-J或t-V在位相互作用，随机相位近似揭示了由带间配对驱动的非公度d_{xy}配对密度波（d-PDW）超导不稳定性区域。我们研究了PDW序与均匀节线d_{xy}配对态以及磁性与电荷密度波（CDW）不稳定性之间的竞争。在强耦合下，我们推导出一个有效的硬核库珀对哈密顿量，并采用玻色型Gutzwiller变分法进行研究，揭示了在广泛填充范围内存在的周期-2 PDW，以及在四分之一填充下存在的棋盘格CDW。我们的结果适用于具有准一维能带的关联多轨道材料、正方-八角晶格上的Hubbard模型以及p轨道中的原子费米子。本工作强调了轨道成分与多带费米面在稳定带间PDW态中的关键作用。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Samuel Vadnais et al. |
| 18 | **[Effect of Mn Substitution on Superconductivity in PrFeAs(O,F): Role of Magnetic Impurities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21684v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate Mn substitution at the Fe site in PrFe1-xMnxAsO0.7F0.3 (0 to 0.1) using structural, Raman, density functional theory (DFT), transport, and magnetic measurements. X-ray diffraction and Raman analyses confirm preferential Mn incorporation into the FeAs planes, accompanied by lattice expansion and suppression of Fe-related vibrational modes. Electrical transport reveals a systematic decrease of the superconducting transition temperature from 48 K (x = 0) to complete suppression at x = 0.1, together with low-temperature resistivity upturns evolving toward insulating-like behavior. Magnetization and magnetotransport measurements show degradation of superconducting coherence, critical current density, upper critical field, and vortex activation energy with increasing Mn content. The results demonstrate that Mn acts as an efficient magnetic impurity, strongly perturbing the electronic and magnetic environment of the FeAs layers. Comparative analysis indicates relatively enhanced robustness of superconductivity in the Pr-based system, highlighting the role of rare-earth-dependent electronic correlations in impurity effects.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用结构、拉曼光谱、密度泛函理论、输运和磁性测量，研究了PrFe1-xMnxAsO0.7F0.3 (0至0.1)中Fe位的Mn替代效应。X射线衍射和拉曼分析证实Mn优先掺入FeAs面内，伴随晶格膨胀和Fe相关振动模式的抑制。电输运显示超导转变温度从48 K (x = 0) 系统性降低至x = 0.1时的完全抑制，同时低温电阻率上翘行为演变为类绝缘体行为。磁化强度和磁输运测量表明，随着Mn含量增加，超导相干性、临界电流密度、上临界场和涡旋激活能均发生退化。结果表明Mn作为有效的磁性杂质，强烈扰动FeAs层的电子和磁环境。对比分析表明Pr基体系中超导性具有相对增强的鲁棒性，突显了稀土依赖的电子关联在杂质效应中的作用。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Priya Singh et al. |
| 19 | **[Two-gap to Single-gap Transition and Two-dome-like Superconductivity in Alkali-Metal Intercalated Bilayer PdTe2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21635v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>PdTe2 has been synthesized with controllable thickness down to the monolayer limit. Based on first-principles calculations within the fully anisotropic Migdal-Eliashberg framework, this work reveals that alkali-metal intercalation markedly enhances the weak superconductivity of bilayer PdTe2, boosting the transition temperature from 1.4 K to 5.0 -13.5 K and yielding a two-dome-like evolution of Tc. Rubidium intercalation induces the highest Tc of 13.5 K, which can be further increased to 14.5 K under biaxial tensile strain. The strain-dependent evolution of Tc also exhibits a two-dome-like behavior, reflecting the interplay between strain-induced band structure modifications and electron-phonon coupling (EPC). Moreover, a systematic correlation is identified between interlayer interaction and superconducting gap. Lithium intercalation induces a distinct two-gap state, whereas intercalants with larger atomic radii (Na, K, Rb, and Cs) drive the system into a single-gap character. The two-gap to single-gap transition originates from the modulation of interlayer coupling through intercalation-induced interlayer expansion. In addition, pristine and Li/Na-intercalated bilayers exhibit nontrivial band topology, suggesting that layered PdTe2 provides a promising platform for realizing the coexistence of superconductivity and nontrivial topology. These results provide detailed anisotropic insights into EPC and offer viable pathways for enhancing Tc and achieving diverse properties in layered PdTe2 systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>已合成出厚度可控至单层极限的PdTe2。基于全各向异性Migdal-Eliashberg框架的第一性原理计算，本工作揭示碱金属插层显著增强了双层PdTe2的弱超导性，将转变温度从1.4 K提升至5.0-13.5 K，并产生Tc的双穹顶状演化。铷插层诱导出13.5 K的最高Tc，在双轴拉伸应变下可进一步提高至14.5 K。Tc随应变的变化也表现出双穹顶状行为，反映了应变诱导的能带结构修饰与电声耦合之间的相互作用。此外，层间相互作用与超导能隙之间建立了系统性的关联。锂插层诱导出独特的双能隙态，而具有较大原子半径的插层剂（Na、K、Rb和Cs）则驱动体系进入单能隙特征。从双能隙到单能隙的转变源于插层引起的层间膨胀对层间耦合的调制。此外，原始及Li/Na插层的双层体系表现出非平庸的能带拓扑，表明层状PdTe2为实现超导与非平庸拓扑共存提供了有前景的平台。这些结果为电声耦合提供了详细各向异性见解，并为提高Tc和在层状PdTe2体系中实现多样化性质提供了可行途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Yu-Lin Han et al. |
| 20 | **[Pulse Shaping for Superconducting Qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21565v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>High-fidelity control of superconducting qubits requires carefully shaped microwave pulses that account for multiple error channels. In this work, we present a pedagogical introduction to pulse-shaping techniques for transmon qubits, aiming to provide a unified, accessible framework that integrates physical intuition for pulse design, analytical understanding of gate-level descriptions, and practical considerations of hardware. This article further aims to serve as a guide for students and early researchers entering superconducting quantum computing. We begin by examining simple pulse envelopes and their spectral properties, highlighting how finite bandwidth leads to leakage outside the computational subspace. These observations motivate the introduction of the derivative removal by adiabatic gate (DRAG) technique, which uses a quadrature component proportional to the pulse's time derivative to suppress off-resonant excitations. We analyze the single-qubit case using the Magnus expansion, which provides a clear understanding of the order-by-order introduction of error channels. We discuss the practical hardware realities of control pulse generation, focusing on arbitrary waveform generators (AWG), local oscillators (LO), and IQ mixing. Common imperfections are discussed in terms of their impact on the effective pulse shape and qubit Hamiltonian. Finally, we extend the discussion to two-qubit operations, focusing on the cross-resonance gate and the emergence of effective interactions.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导量子比特的高保真度控制需要精心设计的、考虑多种误差通道的微波脉冲。本工作对transmon量子比特的脉冲整形技术进行了教学性介绍，旨在提供一个统一且易于理解的框架，该框架整合了脉冲设计的物理直觉、门级描述的解析理解以及硬件的实际考量。本文旨在为进入超导量子计算领域的学生和早期研究者提供指南。我们首先考察简单的脉冲包络及其频谱特性，强调有限带宽如何导致向计算子空间外的泄漏。这些观察促使我们引入绝热门导数去除技术，该技术利用与脉冲时间导数成正比的 quadrature 分量来抑制非共振激发。我们使用Magnus展开分析单量子比特情况，该展开清晰提供了误差通道逐级引入的理解。我们讨论了控制脉冲生成的实际硬件现实，重点介绍任意波形发生器、本地振荡器和IQ混频。常见的非理想性根据其对有效脉冲形状和量子比特哈密顿量的影响进行讨论。最后，我们将讨论扩展到双量子比特操作，重点关注交叉共振门和有效相互作用的产生。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Animesh Patra et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Replica Theory of Spherical Boltzmann Machine Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17936v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Training in machine learning generally consists in finding one model, whose parameters minimize a data-dependent loss. Yet, empirical work shows that ensemble learning, an approach in which multiple models are sampled, can improve performance. Here, we provide an analytical framework to understand these observations in the case of Boltzmann machines, exploiting a duality between ensemble learning and large deviations of the free energy in spin-glass models. Replica calculations allow us to fully solve the case of spherical Boltzmann machine ensembles, and clarify when ensemble learning improves over standard loss minimization, in particular for nearly finite-dimensional data. Our framework can also be applied to complex data distributions, in agreement with numerical simulations on deep networks.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>机器学习训练通常旨在寻找单一模型，其参数能最小化数据相关的损失函数。然而实证研究表明，采用多模型采样的集成学习方法可提升性能。本文针对玻尔兹曼机建立分析框架，利用集成学习与自旋玻璃模型中自由能大偏差理论的对偶性来解释上述现象。通过副本计算，我们完整求解了球形玻尔兹曼机集成问题，阐明了集成学习在何种条件下优于标准损失最小化方法——尤其是针对近有限维数据。该框架还可应用于复杂数据分布，与深度网络数值模拟结果一致。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Thomas Tulinski et al. |
| 2 | **[Bayesian phase transition for the critical Ising model: Enlarged replica symmetry in the epsilon expansion and in 2D](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23346v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>A process that images or measures bond energies in the critical Ising model can be in distinct measurement ``phases'', depending on the precision of measurement. We study the transition into the strong-measurement phase using replica field theory (an epsilon expansion around six dimensions) and numerical simulations in two dimensions. The results reveal multiscaling of correlation functions at the critical point, and a striking enlarged symmetry of the replica description. This is an analog of the Nishimori phenomenon in the Ising spin glass, in a distinct replica limit. The enlarged symmetry is present microscopically for certain measurement protocols, but more generally can emerge in the infrared, and it fixes the exact value of the exponent for the Edwards-Anderson correlator both in 2D and near the upper critical dimension. We also examine the epsilon expansion for models with power-law interactions and/or long-range measurement.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>对临界伊辛模型中键能进行成像或测量的过程，根据测量精度可处于不同的测量"相"。我们采用副本场论（六维ε展开）与二维数值模拟研究强测量相变。结果表明临界点关联函数存在多标度行为，且副本描述呈现显著的对称性增强现象。这对应于伊辛自旋玻璃中Nishimori现象在特定副本极限下的类比。该增强对称性在特定测量协议下具有微观起源，但更普遍情况下可在红外区域涌现，并精确确定了二维及上临界维度附近Edwards-Anderson关联函数的临界指数。我们还研究了具有幂律相互作用和/或长程测量模型的ε展开。</p></details> | 2026-04-25 | Kay Joerg Wiese et al. |
| 3 | **[Autonomous Emergence of Hamiltonian in Deep Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20821v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The unprecedented predictive success of deep generative models in complex many-body systems, such as AlphaFold3, raises an epistemological question: do these networks merely memorize data distributions via high-dimensional interpolation, or do they autonomously deduce the underlying physical laws? To address this, we introduce a rigorous algebraic framework to extract the implicit physical interactions learned by generative models. By establishing an exact equivalence between the zero-noise limit of a Riemannian diffusion score field and the thermodynamic restoring force, we utilize the trained neural network as a direct force estimator. Applying this framework to a sequence-dependent, frustrated 1D $O(3)$ spin glass, we probe the latent representations of an $O(3)$-equivariant attention architecture trained solely on thermal equilibrium snapshots. Without incorporating any energetic priors, an overdetermined linear inversion successfully recovers the microscopic Hamiltonian parameters of the spin system. The inferred Hamiltonian parameters exhibit a $99.7\%$ cosine similarity with the ground-truth interaction parameters. Furthermore, these sparse local parameters alone are sufficient to explain $87\%$ of the variance in the continuous force field predicted by the network. Our results provide quantitative, falsifiable evidence that deep generative architectures do not merely perform statistical pattern matching, but autonomously discover and internalize the underlying physical rules.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>深度生成模型在复杂多体系统（如AlphaFold3）中取得了前所未有的预测成功，这引发了一个认识论问题：这些网络仅仅是通过高维插值来记忆数据分布，还是自主推导出了潜在的物理定律？为解决此问题，我们引入了一个严格的代数框架来提取生成模型所学习的隐式物理相互作用。通过建立黎曼扩散得分场零噪声极限与热力学恢复力之间的精确等价关系，我们将训练好的神经网络用作直接的力估计器。将该框架应用于一个序列依赖、受挫的一维$O(3)$自旋玻璃模型，我们探究了一个仅基于热平衡快照训练的$O(3)$等变注意力架构的潜在表征。在不引入任何能量先验的情况下，一个超定线性反演成功恢复了自旋系统的微观哈密顿量参数。推断出的哈密顿量参数与真实相互作用参数的余弦相似度达到$99.7\%$。此外，仅凭这些稀疏的局域参数就能解释网络预测的连续力场中$87\%$的方差。我们的结果提供了定量、可证伪的证据，表明深度生成架构并非仅仅执行统计模式匹配，而是自主发现并内化了潜在的物理规则。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Wenjie Xi et al. |
| 4 | **[Tensor network surrogate models for variational quantum computation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20180v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We adopt a two-dimensional tensor-network (TN) ansatz to simulate variational quantum algorithms on two-dimensional qubit architectures, demonstrating its capability to accurately simulate deep circuits through the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) applied to Ising spin-glass problems on heavy-hexagonal and square lattices. For heavy-hexagonal problems with up to three-body interactions, parameters trained on small instances and transferred to systems an order of magnitude larger improve the sampled energy distribution only up to intermediate depths, indicating a fundamental limit of parameter concentration as a transfer strategy. By extending the training itself with TN simulations on larger system sizes, we avoid local minima and obtain lower-energy samples. Analyses of entanglement growth and importance sampling show that the simulation remains classically feasible with moderate bond dimension. We find that parameter concentration also persists on square lattices, albeit at substantially higher computational cost to perform reliable sampling. Overall, our TN framework not only provides an efficient and controlled framework for benchmarking variational quantum algorithms on two-dimensional lattices, but also serves as an effective surrogate model for training variational algorithms.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们采用二维张量网络（TN）变分拟设来模拟二维量子比特架构上的变分量子算法，通过将量子近似优化算法（QAOA）应用于重六边形和方形晶格上的伊辛自旋玻璃问题，展示了其精确模拟深度电路的能力。对于包含最多三体相互作用的重六边形问题，在小规模实例上训练并迁移至大一个数量级系统的参数，仅能在中等深度内改善采样能量分布，这表明参数集中化作为一种迁移策略存在根本性局限。通过使用张量网络模拟在更大系统规模上扩展训练本身，我们避免了局部极小值并获得了更低能量的样本。对纠缠增长和重要性采样的分析表明，该模拟在中等键维数下仍保持经典可行性。我们发现参数集中化在方形晶格上同样存在，尽管进行可靠采样的计算成本显著更高。总体而言，我们的张量网络框架不仅为在二维晶格上基准测试变分量子算法提供了高效且可控的框架，同时也作为训练变分算法的有效替代模型。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Ryo Watanabe et al. |
| 5 | **[NaCl-Assisted Growth of Ferroelectric SnSe Nanosheets with Spin Glass-like Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10067v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Two-dimensional (2D) SnSe is an emerging 2D material exhibiting intriguing properties such as ferroelectricity and nonlinear optical response. Here, high-quality single-crystalline SnSe nanosheets were synthesized via NaCl-assisted chemical vapor deposition (CVD) method. The addition of NaCl was found to significantly increase the surface coverage of the nanosheets with less influence on their lateral size. The crystalline structure and composition of as-grown nanosheets were charactered by XRD, Raman spectroscopy, and XPS. Ferroelectric domains in SnSe nanosheets are directly visualized by piezoresponse force microscopy (PFM). The magnetic hysteresis loops of SnSe nanosheets are achieved at 2 K, which indicated their weak ferromagnetism. A spin glass-like behavior was observed below 115K, which is attributed to the presence of SnSe2 impurity. This work further establishes a controllable synthesis route for SnSe nanosheets, thereby paving the way for subsequent investigation of their ferroelectric properties.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>二维（2D）SnSe是一种新兴的二维材料，展现出铁电性和非线性光学响应等引人入胜的特性。本文通过氯化钠辅助化学气相沉积（CVD）方法合成了高质量的单晶SnSe纳米片。研究发现，添加氯化钠能显著提高纳米片的表面覆盖率，而对其横向尺寸影响较小。利用X射线衍射（XRD）、拉曼光谱和X射线光电子能谱（XPS）对生长所得纳米片的晶体结构和组成进行了表征。通过压电力显微镜（PFM）直接观察了SnSe纳米片中的铁电畴。在2K温度下获得了SnSe纳米片的磁滞回线，表明其具有弱铁磁性。在115K以下观察到类似自旋玻璃的行为，这归因于SnSe2杂质的存在。本工作进一步建立了一种可控的SnSe纳米片合成路线，从而为其后续铁电性能的研究铺平了道路。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Huiwen Xu et al. |
| 6 | **[Dynamical magnetism in the disordered cubic lattice material $γ$-${\rm Ba}_{3}{\rm CoNb}_{2}{\rm O}_{9}$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18794v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>$γ$-${\rm Ba}_{3}{\rm CoNb}_{2}{\rm O}_{9}$ realizes a disordered simple-cubic spin-$1/2$ lattice in which Co$^{2+}$ ions randomly occupy one third of the sites, placing the system close to the site-percolation threshold for magnetic order. Specific-heat, susceptibility, neutron spin-echo, and muon spin-rotation measurements reveal a broad thermodynamic crossover, short-range magnetic correlations, and persistent fast spin dynamics down to at least 0.1~K, with no evidence for static order or conventional spin-glass freezing. Monte Carlo simulations yield a broad distribution of orphan spins, finite clusters, and an infinite network. The calculated orphan-spin fraction ($\approx 8.8\%$) agrees well with the weakly correlated spin fraction inferred from magnetization ($\approx 8.2\%$). Exact diagonalization of a diluted $S = 1/2$ Heisenberg model captures the broad magnetic specific-heat anomaly and supports the coexistence of weakly and strongly correlated spin environments. These results support a picture in which spin-$1/2$ quantum fluctuations, together with dilution and proximity to the percolation threshold, can support a disorder-driven dynamical state with short-range correlations in three dimensions, distinct from both classical spin glasses and geometrically frustrated quantum spin liquids.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>$γ$-${\rm Ba}_{3}{\rm CoNb}_{2}{\rm O}_{9}$ 实现了一个无序的简单立方自旋-1/2晶格，其中 Co$^{2+}$ 离子随机占据三分之一的格点，使该系统接近磁有序的格点渗流阈值。比热、磁化率、中子自旋回波和μ子自旋旋转测量揭示了一个宽泛的热力学交叉、短程磁关联以及持续到至少 0.1~K 的快速自旋动力学，没有发现静态有序或传统自旋玻璃冻结的证据。蒙特卡洛模拟得到了孤儿自旋、有限团簇和一个无限网络的宽泛分布。计算得到的孤儿自旋比例（$\approx 8.8\%$）与从磁化强度推断出的弱关联自旋比例（$\approx 8.2\%$）吻合良好。对稀释的 $S = 1/2$ 海森堡模型进行精确对角化，再现了宽泛的磁比热异常，并支持弱关联与强关联自旋环境共存。这些结果支持了一种图像，即自旋-1/2量子涨落，连同稀释效应以及接近渗流阈值，可以在三维空间中支撑一种具有短程关联的无序驱动动力学态，该态既不同于经典自旋玻璃，也不同于几何阻挫的量子自旋液体。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Fanjun Xu et al. |
| 7 | **[Searching for emergent spacetime in spin glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.20902v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recent work on algebraic formulations of holographic dualities in terms of large $N$ algebras has revealed a deep connection between the properties of the associated spectral functions and the emergence of a semiclassical spacetime and causal horizons therein. One of the main lessons is that, for a radial direction to emerge, the spectral function has to exhibit non-compact support. Furthermore, there exist conjectures upon a possible duality between complex gravitational configurations and glassy systems. The goal of this paper is to combine these ideas by studying many-body quantum-mechanical systems and assess in which parameter regimes they could potentially be holographic. Thus, we compute the spectral functions of three many-body systems with quenched disorder, the SYK model, the $p$-spin model and the SU$(M)$ Heisenberg chain in the large $N$ limit and present results in different parameter regimes. Our main finding is that in the quantum spin glass phase of the SU$(M)$ Heisenberg model, the spectral function develops an exponential tail, similar to the large $q$ limit of SYK. Furthermore, we demonstrate the presence of an infinite family of quasiparticle excitations deep in the spin liquid phase of the $p$-spin model, which could point towards an emergent type I von Neumann algebra. In addition, we demonstrate the presence of an exponential tail in the spectral function for all cases without compact support and conformal symmetry. Motivated by this observation, we prove that no low-energy operator can detect a nontrivial bulk causal structure, if the spectral function has exponentially decaying tails.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期关于全息对偶性代数表述（基于大N代数）的研究揭示了相关谱函数性质与半经典时空及其因果视界涌现之间的深刻联系。一个重要启示是：为使径向维度涌现，谱函数必须具有非紧支撑。此外，存在关于复杂引力构型与玻璃态系统可能对偶性的猜想。本文旨在融合这些思想，通过研究多体量子力学系统并评估其在何种参数范围内可能具有全息性。为此，我们计算了三种具有淬火无序的多体系统（SYK模型、p-自旋模型和大N极限下的SU(M)海森堡链）的谱函数，并展示了不同参数区间的结果。主要发现是：在SU(M)海森堡模型的量子自旋玻璃相中，谱函数会产生指数衰减尾，类似于SYK模型的大q极限。此外，我们证明了在p-自旋模型的自旋液体相深处存在无限族的准粒子激发，这可能指向一类涌现的I型冯·诺依曼代数。另外，我们证明了在所有不具备紧支撑与共形对称性的情况下，谱函数均存在指数衰减尾。基于此观察，我们证明：若谱函数具有指数衰减尾，则任何低能算子都无法探测到非平凡的体因果结构。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Dimitris Saraidaris et al. |
| 8 | **[Demonstrating Real Advantage of Machine-Learning-Enhanced Monte Carlo for Combinatorial Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.19544v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Combinatorial optimization problems are central to both practical applications and the development of optimization methods. While classical and quantum algorithms have been refined over decades, machine learning--assisted approaches are comparatively recent and have not yet consistently outperformed simple, state-of-the-art classical methods. Here, we focus on a class of Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problems, specifically the challenge of finding minimum energy configurations in three-dimensional Ising spin glasses. We use a Global Annealing Monte Carlo algorithm that integrates standard local moves with global moves proposed via machine learning. We show that local moves play a crucial role in achieving optimal performance. Benchmarking against Simulated Annealing and Population Annealing, we demonstrate that Global Annealing not only surpasses the performance of Simulated Annealing but also exhibits greater robustness than Population Annealing, maintaining effectiveness across problem hardness and system size without hyperparameter tuning. These results provide clear and robust evidence that a machine learning--assisted optimization method can exceed the capabilities of classical state-of-the-art techniques in a combinatorial optimization setting.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>组合优化问题在实践应用和优化方法发展中均处于核心地位。尽管经典与量子算法历经数十年发展已日趋完善，但机器学习辅助方法相对较新，且尚未能稳定超越简单的经典前沿方法。本文聚焦于一类二次无约束二进制优化问题，特别是三维伊辛自旋玻璃中寻找最小能量构型的挑战。我们采用一种全局退火蒙特卡洛算法，该算法将标准局部移动与通过机器学习提出的全局移动相结合。研究表明，局部移动对实现最优性能至关重要。通过与模拟退火和群体退火进行基准测试，我们证明全局退火不仅性能超越模拟退火，而且比群体退火更具鲁棒性——无需超参数调优即可在不同问题难度和系统规模下保持有效性。这些结果为机器学习辅助优化方法在组合优化场景中能够超越经典前沿技术提供了清晰而坚实的证据。</p></details> | 2026-04-19 | Luca Maria Del Bono et al. |
